name: Jello Flavored Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, sift together 1 1/4 cups of the sugar, flour, and baking powder.
2. Add gelatin to the dry mixture and stir until well combined.
3. In another bowl, combine milk, oil, and lemon extract.
4. Beat the liquids into the dry ingredients until the batter is smooth.
5. Beat egg yolks one at a time into the batter.
6. In a separate clean bowl, whip egg whites with 1/4 cup of sugar until stiff but not dry.
7. Gently fold the whipped egg whites into the batter.
8. Grease a ring pan with vegetable shortening and dust with flour.
9. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan and bake at 325°F for 40 to 50 minutes, or until the cake springs back when touched.
10. Turn out the cake immediately onto a wire rack.
11. Decorate with a thin icing and trim as desired.
Note: Janice Norman contributed this recipe to the CD-ROM that I received from. She used strawberry jello and extract, and also found that 40 minutes was too long to bake this cake in her oven.
